name: Ryan, Tim
subject: what we need now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Right now, we need a leader who can withstand pressure and remain zen through it all -- and that leader is me.

Living mindfully allows me to break through the noise and rhetoric in Washington DC and create new and innovative solutions to our biggest challenges.

[**If you are interested in this approach to leadership and want to see our campaign move to the next stage, will you chip in today? We cannot do this without you.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-august-earlystates?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+are+interested+in+this+approach+t&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1")

**Contribute here:[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/earlystates](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-august-earlystates?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomearlystat&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1")**

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

> Folks,
>
> I'll get right to it -- we have to talk to more voters in the early states if we're going to raise our profile in national polls and qualify for the next debate.
>
> **We need to hit 2% in 4 polls over the next two weeks![Can you help me get out and talk to voters by making a contribution to power our campaign between now and our August deadline?](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-august-earlystates?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+help+me+get+out+and+talk+to+vote&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1")**
>
> A few days ago, I had the pleasure of doing yoga with Rolf Gates and Dan Nevins as part of my "Healing America through Mindful Leadership" event.
>
> Gates and Nevins are two armed service veterans who understand the importance of meditation and breathing on the mind, body, and most importantly of all -- the spirit.
>
> [**This is the kind of approach we need to apply in our daily lives -- including our politics. If you agree, will you help me bring this brand of leadership to the White House in 2020?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-august-earlystates?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+This+is+the+kind+of+approach+we+need+to+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190817_1_1")
>
> Thanks for your input --
> Tim

|

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Help us respond to the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
The NRA doesn’t like Beto’s gun violence plan. Now they’re doing everything they can to stop us from advancing it.
#
Beto visited a gun show in Arkansas today to talk about his new gun violence prevention plan. We’re pretty surprised by the reaction he got. It turns out, lots of gun owners are supportive of proposals like background checks and an assault weapons ban.
One Trump supporter even said: "I saw you walk by and said, 'Wow what's he doing here?’ I respect you for talking to me."
But the gun lobby is having absolutely none of it. **Now the state’s gun-lobby-funded Lieutenant Governor and the National Rifle Association are attacking Beto online.** Why? Because gun manufacturers, their PACs, and their lobbyists — not gun owners — are terrified of Beto’s plan.
[Can you help us respond to these attacks? Make a $3 donation to say you’re sick and tired of the NRA standing in the way of reasonable and urgent reform.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26399?refcode=ema20190817-49549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=49549%2E444211%2Ep2UnqS)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26399?refcode=ema20190817-49549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=49549%2E444211%2Ep2UnqS)**
We don’t accept ANY money from ANY PACs or special interests like the NRA. That’s why the donations we collect from emails like this are so important. You help us run a campaign that’s not beholden to anyone — least of all the gun lobby.
Thanks for donating, especially today with a powerful organization like the NRA on our tails.
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=49549%2E444211%2Ep2UnqS). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

| Michael rolled out a multi-step election security plan, so we're bumping it to the top of your inbox.

Even in the face of irrefutable evidence, McConnell and Trump continue to stonewall election security legislation.

By refusing to act, they are doing what the Russians want them to do: destroy our democracy from within.

[**Please take a moment to read the plan below.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Friends,

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are putting the security of the 2020 election at grave risk.

They refuse to take any action to defend our democracy from foreign interference.

[**I 'm rolling out a multi-step election security plan that I will enact as your next president.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**FIRST:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Secure our elections. My plan raises standards and increases resources to protect every precinct in America with new voting machines, mandatory audits, improved election procedures, and stronger cybersecurity.

[**SECOND:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Fight foreign interference. By closing campaign finance loopholes that allow foreign actors to distort our media, elections, and campaigns, we can fight back against interference.

[**THIRD:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Start a dialogue. We will open a dialogue with the American people about ongoing threats to our democracy and steps our government is taking to protect it. Foreign adversaries want to undermine the public's faith in democracy; we must restore it.

[**FINALLY:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") Reclaim our respect. We will reclaim America's historic leadership role by mobilizing our allies to push back against threats to democracy worldwide. We will work with our partners in Europe, NATO, and elsewhere to respond forcefully to those attacking democracy, strengthen election security, and support civil society.

[**Democracy is under attack at home and across the globe. We must rise in its defense.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b15/3769448302/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Trump and McConnell's inaction is damaging the integrity of our election system and the future of our democracy.

[**We can 't allow this to continue. You can read my election security plan here.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac4a/134673f2/c87ab91/69964b14/3769448302/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/electionsecurity")

Thanks for standing with me.

Michael

name: Dennis Collard
subject: a PROVEN progressive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

Our successes in 2018 proved that as Georgia Democrats, we must unapologetically embrace and fight for the core values of our party and reject the old “conventional wisdom” that had previous candidates running right up the middle, trying to make everyone happy, but not exciting anyone. The extraordinary candidate at the top of the 2018 ticket taught us what it really takes to get out the vote and what it will take to win in 2020.
Next year, Georgia Democrats will again face a Republican opponent who will use every effort in the GOP voter suppression handbook to get elected, but we’ll also have a Democrat with a spine of steel who has stepped forward and is ready to win the fight for the progressive principles we believe in. That candidate is Teresa Tomlinson.

Join me as one of Teresa’s grassroots supporters by pledging a $5, $10, or $20.20 donation every month between now and Election Day 2020. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinson-recurring?refcode=em_081819A&recurring=1]

As a proud gay man and an attorney specializing in family law issues facing our LGBTQ+ brothers and sisters, I know what it means to be on the front lines of the progressive movement.

The very first time I met Teresa I saw why the people of Columbus, Georgia twice elected her to run their city, and why her executive experience running a big city is exactly what we need to take on David Perdue next year.

Teresa was speaking about her decades-long fight for equality and how that fight continues to this day. She talked about being in the trenches with the LGBTQ+ community long before it was popular, the amazing progress we’ve achieved, and how many more battles there are still to win in order to achieve equality for all people.

It’s clear that when Teresa sees injustice, she doesn’t stop fighting to change it no matter the odds against her. We need that kind of leadership in the U.S. Senate.

Teresa Tomlinson is going to beat David Perdue next year because she’s going to run as a bold progressive with a clear message who is supported by a grassroots movement. None of this is new to Mayor Tomlinson. She’s battle-tested and ready to go toe-to-toe with David Perdue and the millions of dollars his special interest cronies will pour into our state to stop us.

But they can’t stop all of us. That’s why I’m asking you to join me and invest in this campaign today with a monthly grassroots contribution of $3, $5, or $10. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinson-recurring?refcode=em_081819A&recurring=1]

Like me, I know you’re ready to send Perdue packing - we can do it, but only if we work together.

I hope you’ll join me,

Dennis Collard

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinson-recurring?refcode=em_081819A&recurring=1]

name: Jason Yates
subject: Don’t forget - tomorrow evening!
body:
| | Peter, I wanted to send you a reminder about our [webinar tomorrow evening at 7:00 pm CT](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ej5vaBQ1PeQtsQeJm5xagspoFxWc4HQNmeMp-rLzyizFzt41TfB4FvKhOVRiStkvBqSpYF_mnYkmTVKRzuBRWg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190818event01&n=1). Will you join us? This is a great opportunity to learn more about how you can help awaken your church to civic engagement. We will discuss the Voter Registration Toolkit and answer your questions to help you host a successful Voter Registration Drive on September 22, 2019 - Voter Registration Sunday! I hope you will be encouraged as we join with other Americans from across the nation, just like you, who are passionate about seeing Christians participate in the civic process by voting! See you tomorrow evening! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ej5vaBQ1PeQtsQeJm5xagspoFxWc4HQNmeMp-rLzyizFzt41TfB4FvKhOVRiStkvBqSpYF_mnYkmTVKRzuBRWg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190818event01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190818event01&n=3) P.S. | | I'll be blunt: _**[I 'm asking for $5 and your help before midnight because I might not make the debate stage without you. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcefd/3eb3e2fc/5ef45ea0/744bae9f/2083627018/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190818_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")**_ Here's what I've learned: **FIRST:** Billionaire hedge fund manager Tom Steyer sunk $10 million into buying votes. **THEN:**** ** He announced he's bought enough donors to qualify for the Democratic debates. **NOW:** I'm asking for a wave of support to secure the final poll I need to get on that stage. [_**I didn 't have the luxury of growing up a frontrunner. I don't have billions to buy my way on that stage. I'm counting on your hard-earned $5 to prove that someone from an immigrant family, who grew up in a poor neighborhood, should have the same shot as a hedge fund owner. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcefd/3eb3e2fc/5ef45ea0/744bae9f/2083627018/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190818_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Not only am I rejecting every cent of corporate PAC money... ...But I just learned Bernie Sanders and I are the only 2020 Presidential candidates who haven't taken money from a single billionaire. I'm proud of the campaign I'm running. I'm proud of the way my campaign is funded. _**[And if you 're proud to be part of this grassroots campaign, I'm humbly asking if you can spare $5 to keep me in this race and get me to the Democratic debates. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcefd/3eb3e2fc/5ef45ea0/744bae9f/2083627018/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190818_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")**_ Thank you, -Julian

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Bevin Corruption Alert
subject: Punishing teachers is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Matt Bevin is in the wrong. His Secretary of the Labor Cabinet, David Dickerson, is threatening to fine teachers who participated in the demonstrations at the Capitol $1,000 A DAY.
|
---

| | Peter, Kentucky's teachers are under attack. Matt Bevin's Labor Cabinet Secretary, David Dickerson, has been threatening our teachers with $1,000 fines for standing up for themselves against Matt Bevin's attacks. On Friday, Dickerson backed down from issuing those fines, **but he 's still telling Kentuckians that our public school teachers broke the law.** And Matt Bevin refuses to lift a finger to defend educators. That's not right.

Teachers strengthen our communities and help raise our children -- treating them this way is **outrageous** and, frankly, **completely unacceptable**. | **Tell Matt Bevin:
PROTECT OUR TEACHERS** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ae2/ad6dc73/148f44d7/db42d06/2425215444/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/beshear-laborsec")**
---
We shouldn't have to say this but punishing our teachers for looking out for public education is **wrong**. Matt Bevin's administration needs to stop attacking hard-working educators. **That's why we're calling on Bevin to fire Secretary Dickerson.**

It's pretty clear Matt Bevin has no problem firing folks in Frankfort -- just ask his own lieutenant governor. So if he really wants to stand up for Kentuckians, he should have no problem telling Dickerson to go pack his bags.

**[Join us in calling on Matt Bevin to do something right for a change. David Dickerson's threats to our teachers are unacceptable. He should be fired.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ae2/ad6dc73/148f44d7/db42d06/2425215444/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/beshear-laborsec")**

This isn't complicated. It's very simply right vs. wrong.

\-- Team Beshear

name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: shortfall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I haven’t emailed you in a couple weeks. We paused our fundraising emails to help out here in El Paso. It was the right call, but after two weeks of no fundraising, we were left with a pretty big shortfall of about $500,000.
#
I haven’t emailed you in a couple weeks. I hope you’re well. We took a break from fundraising. I’m not “Mr. Earnest Email” but it was truly beautiful to watch this community come together after the attack. With your help, we helped bring in a lot of resources for victims and survivors. But here’s the rub: after two weeks of not fundraising, we’ve got a shortfall — $500,000 to be exact. That’s because emails (like this very email you’re reading right now) are the number one way we raise money.
We asked you to help close the gap, and as of right now, about 2,671 people have donated. I’m not a math whiz but our numbers people say that we’ll need 16,104 more donations before the end of the month to hit the goal. If we can get that, we’ll be good to go.
**Will you make $3 contribution right now?** After two weeks focusing away from fundraising, we could really use your help. Here’s the link:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email-20190818](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26445?refcode=ema20190818-49697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=49697%2E444211%2EZhQdUA)
I’m sure you saw that Beto went back out with an incredible speech about the campaign he wants to run: one that directly takes on Trump, calls out injustice, and goes to every community where the president’s hate has caused harm so we can lift them up.
It’s game on. We’re excited, and you should be too. But we really need to hit this goal. I hope you can show that you’re with us. Here’s that link one more time:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email-20190818](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26445?refcode=ema20190818-49697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=49697%2E444211%2EZhQdUA)
Thanks,
Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: It's who we are as Mountaineers...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/D%20Logo.png]

Fellow Democrat,

On Friday news broke that ICE was raiding communities and businesses across the state of West Virginia. As Mountaineers do, we began looking out for each other. That's who we are as West Virginians, and that's who we are supposed to be as Americans.

Donald Trump turned fear and hate into a campaign tactic when he ran for President. Since then, he's done nothing but turn those hateful tactics into real attacks on immigrant communities and communities of color.

Is that who we are as Americans? Absolutely not.

These raids are attacks on people who work hard, pay taxes, and are raising their families here. They are giving back to our communities and making a difference. These are children who are growing up here and going to school while being scared each day when they return home; their parents won't be there. These are parents who work in fear every single day, but still, they work to provide for their children and families.

The hate instilled in America by this administration is like nothing we've ever seen, and it must come to an end. Donald Trump's only goal is to divide us as a country so he can further his life-threatening political agenda.

Keeping families together, keeping our communities strong, and coming together when times are tough is what makes us Mountaineers. We have to remember that, and we have to keep fighting to protect all of us.

These actions by our government under Trump's direction are despicable and unacceptable. We will have our say in 2020 when we vote him out, but until then we continue the fight.

I want to thank you for coming together and fighting to protect our fellow West Virginians, and now we must continue onward.

Sincerely,
Belinda Biafore, WVDP Chairwoman

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

name: Team Beto
subject: One of the best speeches we’ve ever seen Beto give
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
If you know friends or family who’ve felt discouraged or disengaged by our politics, this is a good opportunity to share a speech like this from Beto.
#
Beto just gave a stirring speech in Arkansas.
On the heels of tragedy in El Paso, Beto laid out how we can move forward as a country on some of the toughest challenges we face. From how we grapple with a history of racism, to how we stop losing 40,000 lives a year to gun violence.
It’s not about just one party or one people getting what they want out of our democracy. It’s about all of us coming together, identifying not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Americans first and foremost. We’re not going to fix problems as serious as racism or gun violence with only half measures or half the country. It’s got to be all of us together.
[**You have to watch this video. Then share it with friends and family, because it’s**** _exactly_****the message we all need to hear.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26532?t=1&akid=49732%2E444211%2EQndU99)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26532?t=2&akid=49732%2E444211%2EQndU99)
**[Watch Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26532?t=3&akid=49732%2E444211%2EQndU99)**
In times like these, it’s not enough to sit on the sidelines. In a democracy like ours, it’s on all of us to make things right. That’s why, as Beto said, we need to shock the conscience of America.
Make sure to watch the speech till the end — it builds and builds as you watch. After you see it, if you know friends or family who’ve felt discouraged or disengaged by our politics, this is a good opportunity to share a speech like this from Beto. We all need a little inspiration right now.
[**Click here to give it a watch and share with friends.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/26532?t=4&akid=49732%2E444211%2EQndU99)
\- Team Beto

Ninety-nine years ago today, the 19th Amendment was ratified, giving women the long-overdue right to vote.

But the fight wasn't over then, and it isn't over now.

For generations, the movement for suffrage and women's rights didn't include all women, and too many women of color were still blocked from the ballot box. But we have to fight for everyone to make true progress for anyone, and our fight must include everyone who identifies as a woman -- no matter their age, their race, their religion, who they love, or whether they have a disability.

We build momentum for the work ahead by celebrating how far we've come, and by honoring the strength and diversity of the movement we're a part of together.

**That's why we partnered with a local artist named Erin Griffiths to create a piece of art that represents Women With Warren -- a community of women across the country who are in this fight.**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'm never going to stop being the strongest voice in the room for women's rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
Right now, we have a misogynist in the White House.

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjE5NjM5MjMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTA3MTc1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| _" Not very polite."_

Peter, it's been 10 weeks since a Fox News host said this about me when I spoke out against the nationwide assault on reproductive freedom.

In all that time and throughout this entire campaign, I've never stopped fighting for what's right, even in the face of criticism and name-calling. And today, I traveled to St. Louis to hold a town hall on reproductive rights--because I refuse to let abortion rights be sidelined in this primary process.

**Not very polite? You got that one right.**

Amid nonstop Republican attacks on our basic rights, American women need a president who truly believes, values, and fights for women. A president with bold ideas and a record of getting them done. A president who doesn't believe in "impossible."

**I 'll always be the strongest voice for women's rights in the room. I'll do it from the debate stage, too--but I need your help to get there, and time's running out. [_Will you make a donation today to help send me to the next debate and elect a president who will always fight for women?_](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjE5NjM5MjMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTA3MTc1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Right now, we have a misogynist in the White House.

He has launched an all-out assault on women's reproductive freedom since day one. He has emboldened right-wing politicians in 30 states to try to restrict abortion access, undermine women's rights, and criminalize doctors.

Make no mistake: The end goal is to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , outlaw abortion, and deny women in America their basic human rights.

I'm proud to have been the first presidential candidate to pledge to ONLY appoint judges and justices who will uphold _Roe_ as settled law. And I'm proud that the entire Democratic field has followed and joined my call.

I've put women at the center of my campaign, just like I have throughout my career, because I believe reproductive rights are nonnegotiable.

**If you want me to continue being a voice for women 's rights in this primary, I'm counting on you to help get me to the next debate so I can give this issue the national attention it deserves.**

---
Make a donation to help send me to the next round of debates before time runs out:
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---

| | [Donate $25](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjE5NjM5MjMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTA3MTc1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Other](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjE5NjM5MjMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTA3MTc1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Now is not the time to play it safe, or be afraid of firsts, or be polite.

Now is the time to fight like hell. Because if Trump and the Republican party want a fight with America's women, it's a fight they'll have--and it's a fight they'll lose.

Thank you.

--Kirsten

Part of that meeting includes going over our campaign’s finances. Our finance team is setting an ambitious goal for us — reach an additional 1000 grassroots contributions from folks like you before the end of August. We use these goals as a benchmark to determine how many resources we can allocate to important programs like voter outreach. If we hit them, we can continue to build our operations in places like New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina. _**If we miss them, we risk losing the momentum we’ve worked so hard to build.**_ [**Can you help us reach our goal of 1000 grassroots contributions before the end of August by being one of the first people to rush a $10 contribution right now?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzZhVB-oeqNomHnCfVS4bxq&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190818&n=2) Thanks for helping us get there,
